allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl\\js\\admin.js"\); for\($i=0;$i -lt $bytes.Length;$i++\){ if\($bytes[$i] -eq 0\){ $start=[Math]::Max\(0,$i-30\); $end=[Math]::Min\($bytes.Length-1,$i+10\); $ctx=-join\($bytes[$start..$end] | ForEach-Object { if\($_ -eq 0\){'<NUL>'} elseif\($_ -ge 32 -and $_ -lt 127\){[char]$_} else {'.'} }\); "offset $i : $ctx" } })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; git show HEAD:js/admin.js | Select-Object -First 3; "---BYTES---"; $b = git show HEAD:js/admin.js | Out-String; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($b\)[0..20] -join ',')

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($raw\); "len chars: $\($txt.Length\)"; "2F62D4 \(blue\) count: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'2F62D4'\)\).Count; "C8A558 \(gold\) count: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'C8A558'\)\).Count; "Space Grotesk count: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'Space Grotesk'\)\).Count)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($raw\); Write-Output \("len chars: " + $txt.Length\); Write-Output \("blue 2F62D4: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'2F62D4'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("gold C8A558: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'C8A558'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("SpaceGrotesk: " + \([regex]::Matches\($txt,'Space Grotesk'\)\).Count\))

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $offsets = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList; for\($i=0;$i -lt $b.Length;$i++\){ if\($b[$i] -eq 0\){ [void]$offsets.Add\($i\) } }; Write-Output \("null offsets: " + \($offsets -join ', '\)\); foreach\($o in $offsets\){ $s=[Math]::Max\(0,$o-25\); $e=[Math]::Min\($b.Length-1,$o+15\); $sb=New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; for\($j=$s;$j -le $e;$j++\){ if\($b[$j] -eq 0\){[void]$sb.Append\('<NUL>'\)} elseif\($b[$j] -ge 32 -and $b[$j] -lt 127\){[void]$sb.Append\([char]$b[$j]\)} else {[void]$sb.Append\('.'\)} }; Write-Output \("@$o : " + $sb.ToString\(\)\) })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); foreach\($o in @\(14,33099,53299,73499,93699,113900,134100,154300\)\){ $s=[Math]::Max\(0,$o-30\); $e=[Math]::Min\($b.Length-1,$o+20\); $sb=New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; for\($j=$s;$j -le $e;$j++\){ $v=$b[$j]; if\($v -eq 0\){[void]$sb.Append\('<NUL>'\)} elseif\($v -ge 32 -and $v -lt 127\){[void]$sb.Append\([char]$v\)} else {[void]$sb.Append\('?'\)} }; Write-Output \("@$o : " + $sb.ToString\(\)\) })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $out=@\(\); foreach\($o in @\(14,33099,53299,73499,93699,113900,134100,154300\)\){ $s=[Math]::Max\(0,$o-30\); $e=[Math]::Min\($b.Length-1,$o+20\); $str=""; for\($j=$s;$j -le $e;$j++\){ $v=$b[$j]; if\($v -eq 0\){$str+='<NUL>'} elseif\($v -ge 32 -and $v -lt 127\){$str+=[char]$v} else {$str+='?'} }; $out += "@$o : $str" }; $out -join "`n")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $o=33099; $s=$o-40; $e=$o+30; $str=""; for\($j=$s;$j -le $e;$j++\){ $v=$b[$j]; if\($v -eq 0\){$str+='<NUL>'} elseif\($v -ge 32 -and $v -lt 127\){$str+=[char]$v} else {$str+=\('['+$v+']'\)} }; Write-Output $str)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); foreach\($o in @\(33099,53299,73499\)\){ $s=$o-35; $e=$o+25; $str=""; for\($j=$s;$j -le $e;$j++\){ $v=$b[$j]; if\($v -eq 0\){$str+='_NUL_'} elseif\($v -ge 32 -and $v -lt 127\){$str+=[char]$v} else {$str+='.'} }; Write-Output \("AT " + $o\); Write-Output $str; Write-Output "" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\1\\Desktop\\distribucionesl"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("js/admin.js"\); $clean = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[byte]; for\($i=16;$i -lt $b.Length;$i++\){ if\($b[$i] -ne 0\){ $clean.Add\($b[$i]\) } }; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\("js/admin.clean.js", $clean.ToArray\(\)\); Write-Output \("cleaned bytes: " + $clean.Count\); node --check js/admin.clean.js; Write-Output \("node exit: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))
